name: Job Alert Aggregator — LinkedIn + Naukri + Indeed → Gemini → WhatsApp/Telegram

nodes.name: Daily Trigger (8 AM)
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 8:00 AM. Adjust timezone in n8n workflow settings to IST.

parameters.goal:
Extract job postings from this LinkedIn Jobs search page. These are ServiceNow Developer and SRE roles in India posted in the last 24 hours.

For EACH job listing visible on the page, extract:
- jobTitle: The exact job title
- company: Company name
- location: City/Location (e.g., 'Hyderabad, India' or 'Remote')
- postedDate: When it was posted (e.g., '2 hours ago', '1 day ago')
- jobUrl: The full LinkedIn URL to the job posting
- jobType: Full-time / Contract / Part-time (if visible)
- experienceLevel: Entry / Mid / Senior (if visible)
- salaryRange: Salary if shown, otherwise 'Not disclosed'
- shortDescription: First 2-3 sentences of the job description if visible
- skills: Key skills mentioned (comma-separated)

Also search for 'Site Reliability Engineer India' on the same page and extract those results too.

Return as JSON: { source: 'LinkedIn', jobs: [{ jobTitle: string, company: string, location: string, postedDate: string, jobUrl: string, jobType: string, experienceLevel: string, salaryRange: string, shortDescription: string, skills: string }] }

Extract up to 20 jobs. Only include jobs posted within the last 24 hours.

Extract job postings from Naukri.com for ServiceNow Developer and SRE roles posted in the last 24 hours.

First, scrape results from the current page (ServiceNow Developer jobs).
Then use the search bar to also search for 'Site Reliability Engineer' and scrape those results too.

For EACH job listing, extract:
- jobTitle: The exact job title
- company: Company name
- location: City/Location
- postedDate: When posted (e.g., 'Today', '1 day ago', 'Few hours ago')
- jobUrl: Full Naukri URL to the job posting
- jobType: Full-time / Contract (if shown)
- experienceLevel: Experience required (e.g., '3-5 years')
- salaryRange: Salary range if shown, otherwise 'Not disclosed'
- shortDescription: First 2-3 sentences of the job description or key responsibilities
- skills: Key skills listed (comma-separated)

Return as JSON: { source: 'Naukri', jobs: [{ jobTitle: string, company: string, location: string, postedDate: string, jobUrl: string, jobType: string, experienceLevel: string, salaryRange: string, shortDescription: string, skills: string }] }

Extract up to 20 jobs. Only include jobs posted within the last 24 hours.

Extract job postings from Indeed India for ServiceNow Developer and SRE roles posted in the last 24 hours.

First, scrape results from the current page (ServiceNow Developer jobs).
Then use the search bar to also search for 'Site Reliability Engineer' and scrape those results too.

For EACH job listing, extract:
- jobTitle: The exact job title
- company: Company name
- location: City/Location
- postedDate: When posted (e.g., 'Just posted', 'Today', '1 day ago')
- jobUrl: Full Indeed URL to the job posting
- jobType: Full-time / Contract (if shown)
- experienceLevel: Experience level if mentioned
- salaryRange: Salary if shown, otherwise 'Not disclosed'
- shortDescription: First 2-3 sentences of the job description or snippet shown
- skills: Key skills mentioned (comma-separated)

Return as JSON: { source: 'Indeed', jobs: [{ jobTitle: string, company: string, location: string, postedDate: string, jobUrl: string, jobType: string, experienceLevel: string, salaryRange: string, shortDescription: string, skills: string }] }

Extract up to 20 jobs. Only include jobs posted in the last 24 hours.

options.systemMessage: You are a senior IT career advisor who helps professionals find the best ServiceNow and SRE opportunities in India. You are data-driven, blunt about job quality, and never recommend roles from shady staffing agencies or clickbait postings. You score jobs fairly and explain your reasoning. Your output will be sent directly to a WhatsApp group — use WhatsApp-compatible formatting (*bold*, _italic_). Keep it scannable on mobile. Do NOT use markdown headers (##). Use emojis and bold text for structure instead.

nodes.name: WhatsApp: Send Top Jobs
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_WHATSAPP_GROUP_CHAT_ID with your actual WhatsApp group chat ID.

nodes.name: Telegram: Send Top Jobs
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID with your Telegram group/channel chat ID. Create a bot via @BotFather first.

parameters.message:
📭 *No new ServiceNow/SRE jobs found today.*
_All three platforms returned zero results for the last 24 hours. This is unusual — will retry tomorrow._

💡 _Tip: Quiet days are great for updating your resume or practicing interview questions!_

nodes.name: Search Config
nodes.notes: Edit this node to customize: roles to search, preferred locations, max job age. This makes it easy to tweak without editing scraper prompts.
